vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current state of the biome. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent or dormant/submerged. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct healthy specimens. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable plant, though it is in a state of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.p1: Systemic Loss: No visible foliage in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.p2: Systemic Loss: No identifiable mint foliage.
inventory_reconciliation.p4: Systemic Loss: No identifiable silver guest foliage.

plant_audit.p1_yellow_pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of growth.
plant_audit.p2_black_pot: Contains only soil and eggshell debris; no plant matter.
plant_audit.p3_black_pot: Single, chlorotic, drooping leaf remaining. High risk of total loss.
plant_audit.p4_shared: No distinct specimen detected; appears to be part of the empty soil mass in the black pot.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears consistently damp/dark across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant eggshell fragments present in P3/P4 pot. Electronic component (IC chip/header) introduced in T-1 and remains in CURRENT.
biome_observations.fungal_presence: None visible, though soil saturation levels are high.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-3: Initial state shows P3 with a single leaf and eggshell debris. P1 and P2 pots are empty.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Introduction of a multi-pin electronic component on the desk surface.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: The electronic component remains; no growth or recovery observed in the Pothos specimen.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. The Pothos (P3) is showing signs of severe nutrient deficiency or root rot (chlorosis and drooping). The other pots are effectively barren, suggesting either total plant loss or extreme dormancy.
anomalies: Introduction of electronic component (likely a DIP header) on the desk surface.
Presence of eggshell fragments as a soil amendment/top dressing.
Total absence of expected species P1, P2, and P4.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently a 'ghost garden.' The only surviving specimen is a single, struggling Pothos leaf in the P3 pot. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at calcium supplementation, but the lack of foliage in the other pots indicates a failure of the primary botanical objectives. The desk surface has been repurposed as a staging area for small electronic components, which are unrelated to the botanical health of the system.
